author: harrishussain24
description: Automatically renames files by replacing spaces with dashes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Harris Hussain
manifest.description: Automatically renames files by replacing spaces with dashes.
manifest.name: Files Name Detector

name: Files Name Detector

releases.author: harrishussain24
releases.description:
Initial release of Files Name Detector.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  - Automatically renames newly created files by replacing spaces with dashes                                                                          
  - Scans and renames existing files with spaces on plugin load
  - Shows a notice for each renamed file
